operate_date.text: วันที่ ทำรายการ

deposit_account_no.text: เลขที่บัญชี

root.sql:
select membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(membership_no) as member_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(membership_no) as member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(membership_no) as member_group_name ,pka_com_function.fp_shr_get_balance_atdate(membership_no,current_date) as share_stock ,(select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.total_loan_int from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no) as total_loan_int , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no ,pka_com_function.fp_form_depno( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no ) as form_depno , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.refer_to_deposit_doc_no ,sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_description , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance)::double precision) as thai_deposit_balance
from sc_dep_m_creditor_item , sc_dep_m_creditor ,sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type where sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no and sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type /*WHERE*/ --and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.operate_date ='09/06/2021' --and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no ='1601176' --and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type ='210'
